title: Home | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited: Leading woven garment manufacturers and 100% exporters from Bangladesh. OEKO-TEX, SEDEX, GOTS, WRAP certified.
hero_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited is a leading woven garment manufacturer and 100% exporter from Bangladesh, delivering premium quality apparel to retailers across Europe and beyond.
hero_card1_desc: Dedicated team ensuring quality at every stage of production
hero_card2_desc: Serving leading retailers across Europe and international markets
cards_desc: We handle every step of the supply chain, from initial concept and sampling through to quality-controlled manufacturing and on-time global export.

cards_items.title: We Design Garments
cards_items.text: From woven tops to lightweight bottoms, nightwear, and kidswear; every style is crafted for global fashion demands with innovation and quality at the core.

cards_items.title: We Manufacture
cards_items.text: With 20 modern production lines and a monthly capacity of 750,000 pieces, our 2,000+ skilled team ensures on-time delivery while maintaining the highest ethical and sustainable standards.

cards_items.title: We Export Globally
cards_items.text: PAL proudly serves leading international retailers worldwide, with an annual turnover of USD 32 million, building long-term partnerships through quality, compliance, and competitive pricing.

about_body: Purbachal Apparel Limited (PAL) is a 100% export-oriented woven garment manufacturer established in 2012 and operational since 2017. Located in Gazipur, Bangladesh, we specialize in producing high-quality woven tops, bottoms, nightwear, kidswear, and swimwear for leading European and global retailers.
about_checklist: 20+ modern production lines with a monthly capacity of 750,000 pieces
100% export-oriented with an annual turnover of USD 32 million
Multiple international certifications: OEKO-TEX, GOTS, SEDEX, WRAP & more
Over 60% female workforce with a strong focus on worker welfare
Committed to environmental sustainability with a 300 KW solar energy target
about_image_alt: Purbachal Apparel factory floor with workers
process_desc: From the first sketch to the final shipment, we follow a rigorous process that guarantees quality and compliance at every stage.

process_items.title: Product Development & Sampling
process_items.desc: We collaborate closely with clients to develop styles, select fabrics, and produce accurate samples, ensuring alignment with market expectations before bulk production begins.

process_items.title: Quality Control & Compliance
process_items.desc: Our dedicated quality assurance team conducts multi-stage inspections throughout production to maintain international quality standards and regulatory compliance.

process_items.title: Global Delivery & Client Support
process_items.desc: We ensure on-time delivery to global destinations with full documentation support, backed by a responsive client service team dedicated to long-term partnerships.

certs_desc: We hold 12 internationally recognized certifications, ensuring that our production processes meet the highest ethical, environmental, and quality standards.
cta_desc: Partner with a manufacturer that delivers quality, compliance, and on-time shipping to global markets.
craft_image_alt: Skilled worker at sewing machine at Purbachal Apparel
